name: Define Grain and Design Fact Tables
description: Build two fact tables with different grains from raw web session and order data

checks.name: fact_sessions has 5 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_sessions;

checks.name: fact_orders has 3 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_orders;

checks.name: Session S1 duration is 15 minutes
checks.query: SELECT session_duration_minutes FROM fact_sessions WHERE session_id = 'S1';

checks.name: Both organic sessions converted
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_sessions WHERE session_id IN ('S1','S3') AND converted = true;
checks.description: Sessions S1 and S3 are organic and both have converted=true
